name: Shen IPA Repository
subtitle: Apps for Feather and other AltStore-compatible signers
description: A personal AltStore-compatible source hosted at shen.zip.

apps.name: uYouEnhanced
apps.subtitle: uYouPlus with additional features
apps.localizedDescription: uYou is the best tweak for the YouTube app. uYouEnhanced is a modified version of qnblackcat's uYouPlus & MiRO92's uYou with even more features. Additional features include skipping sponsorships in videos, more PiP options, unlocking higher resolutions, disabling overlays, removing upsell alerts, dimming the UI, enabling the miniplayer, preventing notch issues, configuring A/B settings, and adding a timestamp button.

versions.localizedDescription:
Current YouTube IPA: "20.44.2"
Current uYouEnhanced Version: "3.0.4"

RELEASE 20.44.2 - 3.0.4: (2026-02-24)

• Updated for YouTube 20.44.2
• Updated App Version Spoofer to support versions 20.34.2–21.08.3
• Marked older spoofer versions 19.01.1–19.20.2 as Deprecated ⚠️
• LowContrastMode updated to 1.8.0 with reorganized code and iOS 16+ focus
• Added new tweak: YTHidePlayerButtons 1.0.0
• Added new tweak: YTweaks by fosterbarnes
• Rewritten AppIconsOptionsController functionality
• Updated Notifications Tab icon customization
• Updated submodules
• Removed options: Disable Modern Buttons & Disable Modern A/B Flags

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: This lets you add your own audio files to your videos.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: YouTube needs bluetooth access to scan for nearby Cast devices.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you create videos using the app.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Your contacts will be sent to YouTube servers to help you find friends to share videos with.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Access to your network allows YouTube to discover and connect to devices such as your TV.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Makes it easier for you to attach location information to your videos and live streams and allows for features such as improved recommendations and ads.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you include audio with your videos and search using your voice.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload media you've already created.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: To personalize ads and provide ad measurement, YouTube will link activity from this app with activity from non-Google apps and websites.

apps.name: Hop
apps.subtitle: Open-source Xray proxy client
apps.localizedDescription: An open-source iOS 26+ proxy client built with SwiftUI, a Network Extension packet tunnel, and a client-only Xray-core bridge. Supports VLESS, REALITY, Trojan, Hysteria2, Shadowsocks, VMess, WireGuard, subscriptions, routing, QR import, latency testing, and local geodata. Tunnel operation requires signing that preserves the Packet Tunnel, App Groups, and Keychain entitlements.

versions.localizedDescription:
Unsigned IPA built from 6a6179/Hop@49622fb916b5d3eab90cd498792fa4af121bbcf7.

- Branch/ref: codex/optimize-tunnel-memory
- Workflow run: https://github.com/6a6179/Hop/actions/runs/29367233834
- Product build (CFBundleVersion): 32
- Size: 23402885 bytes
- SHA-256: bd7034f4478d1aa01a77bc6f63a2b8568dfaa68fd9befa5a4acf22a214ee9ab0

This IPA is ad-hoc fakesigned: each binary carries its required entitlements (Packet Tunnel, App Groups, Keychain) with a placeholder XXXXXXXXXX. team prefix so sideload signers can re-map them. It still needs proper signing/provisioning before installation on a physical device. When re-signing, make sure your tool signs the embedded HopTunnel.appex with the Packet Tunnel entitlement — without it iOS kills the VPN extension at launch.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Hop uses the camera to scan proxy node and subscription QR codes.

apps.name: Flappy Bird
apps.subtitle: A Swift Flappy Bird clone
apps.localizedDescription: A close Flappy Bird clone written in Swift with support for iPhone and iPad. Version 4.3 removes the leaderboard, accounts, and anti-cheat components.

versions.localizedDescription:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/crypticplank/flappybird/compare/4.2.0...4.3
* Removed Leaderboard
* Removed Accounts
* Removed Anti-Cheat
